title: First-Line Supervisors of Correctional Officers
description: Directly supervise and coordinate activities of correctional officers and jailers.

tasks.text: Take, receive, or check periodic inmate counts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain order, discipline, and security within assigned areas in accordance with relevant rules, regulations, policies, and laws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain knowledge of, comply with, and enforce all institutional policies, rules, procedures, and regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Respond to emergencies, such as escapes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise and direct the work of correctional officers to ensure the safe custody, discipline, and welfare of inmates.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise or perform searches of inmates or their quarters to locate contraband items.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor behavior of subordinates to ensure alert, courteous, and professional behavior toward inmates, parolees, fellow employees, visitors, and the public.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Restrain, secure, or control offenders, using chemical agents, firearms, or other weapons of force as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Carry injured offenders or employees to safety and provide emergency first aid when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Complete administrative paperwork or supervise the preparation or maintenance of records, forms, or reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise activities, such as searches, shakedowns, riot control, or institutional tours.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct roll calls of correctional officers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Instruct employees or provide on-the-job training.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Resolve problems between inmates.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Set up employee work schedules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine incoming or outgoing mail to ensure conformance with regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transfer or transport offenders on foot or by driving vehicles, such as trailers, vans, or buses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review offender information to identify issues that require special attention.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop work or security procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Convey correctional officers' or inmates' complaints to superiors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise or provide security for offenders performing tasks, such as construction, maintenance, laundry, food service, or other industrial or agricultural operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct evaluations of employees' performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Rate behavior of inmates, promoting acceptable attitudes and behaviors to those with low ratings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
